subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who, through His all-compelling Will, hath moved the Supreme Pen in the kingdom of creation, which at times hath withheld [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی حرک القلم الاعلی بارادته المهیمنه فی ملکوت الانشاء مره امسک
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
